title: Claude Mythos 5 + Fable 5 Are Here And The Numbers Are INSANE
summary: Anthropic released Claude Mythos 5 and Fable 5 (Mythos 5 with guardrails). Fable 5 is available at no extra cost on Pro, Max, Team, and Enterprise plans through June 22, after which it requires usage credits. The release emphasizes performance improvements with impressive benchmark numbers.
writeup: The video covers Anthropic's release of two models, Claude Mythos 5 and Fable 5, the latter described as Mythos 5 with guardrails. Fable 5 is available at no extra cost on Pro, Max, Team, and Enterprise plans through June 22, after which it requires usage credits. The release centers on performance improvements and benchmark results.
